GOVERNANCE
THREE INSPIRING VISIONARY LEADERS
ONE GOAL. ONE DIRECTION.
Mr.R.Mohanram
Chairman
In today’s fast paced and rapidly changing world, being agile and adaptive to technological changes is a must and this is what sets us apart. I can say with pride, that Sri Eshwar has been providing quality education on par with global standards. Since the inception, we have always been walking hand-in-hand with the needs of the industry, keeping ourselves updated with the trends, and producing best-in-class engineers who are ready to take on the world.
With strong visionary leadership and highly committed faculty, Team Sri Eshwar has been able to bring out the best in each student by giving them all resources required to reach great heights. I once again heartily congratulate the college for taking ardent and intense interest in moulding the smart future engineers!
Mr.R.Rajaram
Director
At Sri Eshwar, we believe that the journey towards your goals isn’t just a path to take, but an integral part of the experience. When you set your goals higher than what you believe you can achieve, then the path will begin to appear. Our role is to follow the path, cross hurdles and obstacles and keep on marching ahead. At Sri Eshwar, you’ll find yourself not just on the right path, but within a supportive community that prioritizes your holistic development, ensuring you reach the peak of success as a well-rounded professional.
Our joy is to see each student leave Sri Eshwar to reach pinnacles of success in their chosen field. It is a true team work.
Dr.Sudha Mohanram
Principal & Joint Managing Trustee
At Sri Eshwar, we try our best to provide the most industry-centric academics, highest quality of infrastructure and facilities, high ranking faculty, a lively and vibrant atmosphere to make this a learner’s paradise! Sri Eshwar is also a researcher’s haven. We inspire our staff and students to dive deep in research by giving them the infrastructure support and research mentorship. We ensure that the seeds of innovative thinking and problem solving are sown in the minds of every student and staff member. We are also committed to give students international study and work experience as it gives a big boost to their confidence and global exposure. Right from the inception of the college, we have focussed on placing our students at top companies and we are hugely successful in placements. Today we stand across Tamil Nadu as a top placements college.
Every day at Sri Eshwar, every hour, every minute, every second – we stand unified with the goal of how to make students successful. Our team works very hard, with a smile on our face, towards this common vision to bring Sri Eshwar to the pinnacle of success.
Our students’ success is our success.
COME JOIN US TO
EXPERIENCE LEARNING
AT ITS BEST!
